parameters.query:
SELECT
   -- `Data`,
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data,
    ROUND(SUM(`spend`),0) AS investimento,
    SUM(`impressions`) AS impressoes,
    SUM(`link_click`) AS cliques,
    SUM(`clicks_all`) AS clicks_all,
    SUM(`landing_page_view`) AS visitas_pagina,
    SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) AS checkouts,
    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`landing_page_view`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`purchase_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`spend`) / NULLIF(SUM(`purchase_all`),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`purchase_value`) / NULLIF(SUM(`spend`),0),
        2
    ) AS roas

FROM `mc_ctx_ls_da_deboraalves`

WHERE `campaign_name` LIKE '%{{ $json.campaign_name }}%'
AND DATE(`Data`) BETWEEN
    CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ $json.dias }} DAY
    AND CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY
-- GROUP BY `Data`

-- ORDER BY `Data` DESC;
;

SELECT
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data,

    ROUND(SUM(`spend`),0) AS investimento,
    SUM(`impressions`) AS impressoes,
    SUM(`link_click`) AS cliques,
    SUM(`clicks_all`) AS clicks_all,
    SUM(`landing_page_view`) AS visitas_pagina,
    SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) AS checkouts,
    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`landing_page_view`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`purchase_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`spend`) / NULLIF(SUM(`purchase_all`),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`purchase_value`) / NULLIF(SUM(`spend`),0),
        2
    ) AS roas

FROM `mc_ctx_ls_da_deboraalves`

WHERE `campaign_name` LIKE '%{{ $json.campaign_name }}%'
AND DATE(`Data`) BETWEEN
    CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) * 2 }} DAY
    AND CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) + 1 }} DAY;

assignments.value:

• Conversão página: {{ $json.atual.conversao_pagina.toNumber().round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% | {{ $json.comparativo.conversao_pagina.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.conversao_pagina.variacao_pp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} pp ({{ $json.atual.conversao_pagina.toNumber()>15?"🦅":"🦆" }})

• Custo por Compra: R$ {{ $json.atual.custo_por_compra.round(2).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.custo_por_compra.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.custo_por_compra.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• ROAS: {{ $json.atual.roas.round(2).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.roas.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.roas.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.roas>2.5?"🦅":"🦆" }})

parameters.query:
SELECT
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data,

    ROUND(SUM(`spend`),0) AS investimento,
    SUM(`impressions`) AS impressoes,
    SUM(`link_click`) AS cliques,
    SUM(`clicks_all`) AS clicks_all,
    SUM(`landing_page_view`) AS visitas_pagina,
    SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) AS checkouts,
    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`VDP_Compra`) AS vendas_vdp,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`landing_page_view`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`purchase_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`spend`) / NULLIF(SUM(`purchase_all`),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`purchase_value`) / NULLIF(SUM(`spend`),0),
        2
    ) AS roas

FROM `mc_ctx_ls_da_deboraalves`

WHERE `campaign_name` LIKE '%VDPJUL%'
AND DATE(`Data`) BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;

SELECT
   -- `Data`,
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,

• Investimento: R$ {{ $json?.atual?.investimento?.round().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.investimento.icone }}{{ $json?.comparativo?.investimento?.variacao?.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Faturamento: R$ {{ $json?.atual?.faturamento?.toNumber().round().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.faturamento.icone }}{{ $json?.comparativo?.faturamento?.variacao?.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%

parameters.query:
SELECT
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data,

    ROUND(SUM(`spend`),0) AS investimento,
    SUM(`impressions`) AS impressoes,
    SUM(`link_click`) AS cliques,
    SUM(`clicks_all`) AS clicks_all,
    SUM(`landing_page_view`) AS visitas_pagina,
    SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) AS checkouts,
    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`VDP_Compra`) AS vendas_vdp,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`landing_page_view`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`purchase_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`spend`) / NULLIF(SUM(`purchase_all`),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`purchase_value`) / NULLIF(SUM(`spend`),0),
        2
    ) AS roas

FROM `mc_ctx_ls_da_deboraalves`

WHERE `campaign_name` LIKE '%VDPJUL%'
AND DATE(`Data`) BETWEEN '2026-07-01' AND CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;

SELECT
    MIN(`Data`) AS min_data,
    MAX(`Data`) AS max_data,

    ROUND(SUM(`spend`),0) AS investimento,
    SUM(`impressions`) AS impressoes,
    SUM(`link_click`) AS cliques,
    SUM(`clicks_all`) AS clicks_all,
    SUM(`landing_page_view`) AS visitas_pagina,
    SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) AS checkouts,
    SUM(`purchase_all`) AS vendas_trafego,
    SUM(`purchase_value`) AS faturamento,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`link_click`) / NULLIF(SUM(`impressions`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS ctr,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`landing_page_view`) / NULLIF(SUM(`link_click`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS connect_rate,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`landing_page_view`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_pagina,

    ROUND(
        (SUM(`purchase_all`) / NULLIF(SUM(`initiate_checkout_all`),0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS conversao_checkout,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`spend`) / NULLIF(SUM(`purchase_all`),0),
        2
    ) AS custo_por_compra,

    ROUND(
        SUM(`purchase_value`) / NULLIF(SUM(`spend`),0),
        2
    ) AS roas

FROM `mc_ctx_ls_da_deboraalves`

WHERE `campaign_name` LIKE '%{{ $json.campaign_name }}%'
AND DATE(`Data`) BETWEEN
    CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) * 2 }} DAY
    AND CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) + 1 }} DAY;
